name: AWP | 渐变之色
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been painted by airbrushing transparent paints that fade together over a chrome base coat. This isn't just a weapon, it's a conversation piece - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器以铬为外表，使用喷笔涂上了相互渐变的透明涂装。 这不仅仅是一把武器，更是一种潮流 - 实习军火商伊莫金
